# zenfra_cloud_integration (Data Source)

Reads a single Zenfra cloud integration by ID or name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a cloud integration by name
data "zenfra_cloud_integration" "aws_prod" {
  name = "AWS Production"
}

# Or by ID
data "zenfra_cloud_integration" "by_id" {
  id = "ci-abc123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the cloud integration. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be specified.
- `name` (String) The display name of the cloud integration. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be specified.

### Read-Only

- `auto_attach_label` (String) Label used for automatic attachment to stacks.
- `aws` (Attributes) AWS-specific configuration. Only set for AWS integrations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--aws))
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the integration was created.
- `last_verified_at` (String) Timestamp when the integration was last verified.
- `organization_id` (String) The organization ID this integration belongs to.
- `provider_type` (String) The cloud provider type (e.g., aws).
- `space_id` (String) The space ID this integration is scoped to.
- `status` (String) The current status of the integration.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the integration was last updated.

<a id="nestedatt--aws"></a>
### Nested Schema for `aws`

Read-Only:

- `generate_on_worker` (Boolean) Whether credentials are generated on the worker rather than the control plane.
- `region` (String) The default AWS region for this integration.
- `role_arn` (String) The IAM role ARN used for assuming credentials.
- `session_duration` (Number) The session duration in seconds for assumed role credentials.
